# Skill: sdlc-test-campaign

## Goal

Launch E2E/UAT test campaigns by executing Playwright scripts, logging anomalies, and producing qualification reports with Go/No-Go quality gate data.

## When to use

- After implementation is complete and E2E scripts are available
- As System E-Campaign in the `sdlc-test` workflow
- Consumes test plans from BA and scripts from Tech — never designs tests

## Procedure

### Phase 1 — Campaign Launch (agent camp.1)
1. Verify prerequisites: seeds loaded, test environment ready, Playwright scripts available
2. Create Xray campaign in Jira
3. Execute E2E Playwright scripts generated by Tech agent `[E2E-SCRIPTS-001]`
4. Log anomalies in Jira with severity classification
5. Record raw execution results

### Phase 2 — Campaign Report (agent camp.2) — depends on Phase 1
1. Classify anomalies by severity and impact
2. Calculate pass/fail rates against thresholds
3. Produce qualification report with Go/No-Go quality gate data
4. Write `[CAMP-RPT-NNN]` campaign report
5. Update `[QUAL-GNG-001]` cumulative quality Go/No-Go data

## Output

- `[CAMP-RPT-NNN]` — campaign execution report
- `[QUAL-GNG-001]` — cumulative quality Go/No-Go data

## Rules

- Never design or modify tests — only execute and report
- Xray is the source of truth for test execution results
- Campaign reports accumulate across sprints
- Anomaly classification follows standard severity levels (Critical, Major, Minor, Cosmetic)
